name: QA 1113
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1113

Exercise the pcp-ipcs(1) command using an archive



Copyright (c) 2016 fujitsu (wulm.fnst@cn.fujitsu.com) 



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu1804-container reproduce
